SPBRG.effect: Defines UART baud timing together with BRGH setting.

TXREG.effect: Writing a byte triggers UART transmission when TXEN is enabled.

RCREG.effect: Holds received UART data and should be read to clear receive state.

ADCON0.effect: Selects ADC channel, enables ADC, and starts conversion with GO/DONE.

ADCON1.effect: Configures analog pin mode and result justification/reference setup.

SSPCON.effect: Configures SPI/I2C mode and enables MSSP module.

SSPADD.effect: In I2C master mode it sets serial clock frequency.

T1CON.effect: Sets Timer1 clock source, prescaler, and on/off state.
